title: GFB Vanilla
description:
Utilities, performance enhancement, immersive features - general use client-side modpack

Designed for GFB Network
body:
# GFB Vanilla
![Screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/CAVLKjzN/images/f9cc23135d68f382506d6b1d660f0abdd4c042a1.png)
<sup>Included Shaders -- Complimentary Reimagined 2. Thank you to EminGTR for permission</sup>  
<sup>Press **K** to activate shaders</sup>

This is a general utility and performance enhancement modpack with many features.

It was designed to be the official client side modpack for GFB Network, but it is well suited for any single player or multiplayer experience that allows the included mods. If you use this pack on GFB Network, it adds many integrated features with our vanilla servers. Some supported features include proximity voice chat, itemswapper for creative builds, and Litematica for easily constructing complex builds in survival.

**Server IP**: GreenFlameblade.com

**Discord**: https://discord.gg/jD6ud6B9Vr

<details>
<summary>Key Binds</summary>

**C** -> Zoom (scroll to zoom further)  
**R** -> Itemswapper  
**X** -> Emote Wheel  
**V** -> Mute Proximity Voicechat  
**M** -> Open Litematica  
**J** -> Voicechat settings  
**K** -> Toggle shaders  
**[** -> Toggle Armor Transparency  
**]** -> Open Armor Transparency Settings
**\** -> Toggle chest search bar
**Del** -> Toggle HUDs

**;** -> Reveal Ghost Blocks

</details>

<details>
<summary>Extra Credits</summary>

Complimentary Reimagined 2 Shaders
* EminGTR
* https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined?hl=en-US

Litematica
* masady
* https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/litematica

Malilib
* masady
* https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/malilib

Inventory HUD+
* dmitrylovin
* https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/inventory-hud-forge

</details>

## Some Major Features
### Advanced HUD Features
* Many useful features in the HUD including compact potion status, inventory display, gear status, etc.
* Designed to be information rich, but unobtrusive  
![Screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/CAVLKjzN/images/071b064721d78830ebba8d1a045c5d8334cf1877.png)


### Audio and Visual Enhancements
* 3D skins and animated capes
* Realistic sound physics with echoes and muffling (works with proximity voicechat)  
* Ambient surroundings adds lots of environmental sounds such as birds and wind  
* Advanced texture options such as connected textures and Optifine-like features  
* Included shaders by EminGTR
![Screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/CAVLKjzN/images/5dab874efd2c9c3adeb5b7904410aef6ff4e199d.png)


### Litematica
* Save schematics of builds, then import them as hologram blueprints as an easy building guide
* Great for designing in a creative server, then transferring it to survival  
* Includes an auto block placement feature if enabled on a server  
![Screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/CAVLKjzN/images/b891a0498467b1ee30a86dd53c95ae5a3f5c2ad2.png)


### Replay Mod and Proximity Voicechat
* Record your Minecraft adventures, then use the built in program to create cinematic scenes.  
* Includes positional voice chat recordings  
* All sound including voice chat uses realistic raytraced audio with echo and muffling  
![Screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/CAVLKjzN/images/10bbfec04969c9aec720256369f695ccb0b86a1e.png)
